accounts.name: caller
docs: The caller — must be a joined member of this circle.
Receives their collateral and contribution back.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig — checked for is_paused.

accounts.name: circle_account
docs: CircleAccount — must be Open or already Cancelled.
Open: first caller transitions it to Cancelled.
Cancelled: subsequent callers can still recover funds.
Cancellation conditions checked in handler —
not in account constraints because they involve
multiple conditions with different logic paths.

accounts.name: caller_member_account
docs: Caller's MemberAccount — proves they are a legitimate
joined member of this circle.
Seeds validate both circle and member pubkey.
claimed flag checked and set to prevent double-refund.

accounts.name: caller_collateral_record
docs: Caller's CollateralRecord — used to calculate
claimable collateral and prevent double-refund.
claimed flag set here atomically with the transfer.

accounts.name: collateral_vault
docs: CollateralVault — returns caller's locked collateral.
Seeds: [b"collateral_vault", circle_account]
Authority: circle_account PDA.

accounts.name: pot_vault
docs: PotVault — returns caller's first round contribution.
Seeds: [b"pot_vault", circle_account]
Authority: circle_account PDA.

accounts.name: caller_token_account
docs: Caller's USDC token account — receives all returned funds.
Validated against the circle's configured mint.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — required by transfer_checked.

accounts.name: member
docs: The claiming member. Must be the owner of the
MemberAccount being claimed against.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig — checked for is_paused.

accounts.name: circle_account
docs: CircleAccount — must be Completed or Cancelled.
No other state allows collateral claims.

accounts.name: member_account
docs: MemberAccount — validated as belonging to this member
in this circle. Confirms this wallet is a legitimate
participant with a collateral record to claim.

accounts.name: collateral_record
docs: CollateralRecord — the permanent audit trail.
Provides total_locked and total_slashed for the
claimable amount calculation.
claimed flag set to true here to prevent double-claim.

accounts.name: collateral_vault
docs: CollateralVault — source of the collateral return.
Seeds: [b"collateral_vault", circle_account]
Authority: circle_account PDA.

accounts.name: member_token_account
docs: Member's USDC token account — receives the collateral.
Validated against the circle's configured mint.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — required by transfer_checked.

accounts.name: creator
docs: The circle creator — automatically becomes position 1.
Pays rent for CircleAccount, CollateralVault, PotVault.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig — read to check is_paused.
Seeds: [b"config"]

accounts.name: circle_account
docs: CircleAccount PDA — the circle's source of truth.
Seeds are derived from the circle's parameters:
[b"circle", contribution_amount, total_members,
frequency as u8, usdc_mint pubkey]
This seed fingerprint is the duplicate prevention
mechanism. Two circles with identical parameters
resolve to the same PDA address. Anchor's `init`
constraint will reject the transaction if the
account already exists — meaning an open circle
with these exact settings already exists.
If you hit this error, join that circle instead.

accounts.name: collateral_vault
docs: CollateralVault — USDC token account PDA.
Holds all member collateral for this circle.
Seeds: [b"collateral_vault", circle_account pubkey]
Authority: circle_account PDA — program controlled.
Never touched during normal operation.
Only moves on default deduction or circle completion.

accounts.name: pot_vault
docs: PotVault — USDC token account PDA.
Accumulates cycle contributions before disbursement.
Seeds: [b"pot_vault", circle_account pubkey]
Authority: circle_account PDA — program controlled.
Fills each cycle, zeroes completely after disburse_pot.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — validated against token program.
Stored in CircleAccount so every subsequent instruction
can verify incoming token accounts against this mint.

accounts.name: caller
docs: The caller — any wallet. No special permissions.
Does not pay rent — no new accounts created here.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig — checked for is_paused.
Also provides protocol_fee_bps for fee calculation.

accounts.name: circle_account
docs: CircleAccount — must be Active.
current_cycle incremented here.
cycle_deadline_slot updated here.
State transitions to Completed on final cycle.

accounts.name: payment_record
docs: PaymentRecord for the current cycle.
All active member bits must be set before
disbursement can proceed.

accounts.name: recipient_member_account
docs: Recipient MemberAccount.
Position must match current_cycle.
Must not have already received the pot.

accounts.name: recipient
docs: Recipient wallet — receives the net pot.
Validated via recipient_member_account.member check
in the handler to ensure the correct wallet is paid.
recipient_member_account.member

accounts.name: recipient_token_account
docs: Recipient's USDC token account.
Net pot lands here. Validated against circle mint.

accounts.name: pot_vault
docs: PotVault — source of the disbursement.
Seeds: [b"pot_vault", circle_account]
Balance should equal active_members × contribution_amount
at this point.

accounts.name: treasury_vault
docs: TreasuryVault — receives the protocol fee.
Seeds: [b"treasury", protocol_config]
TreasuryVault — receives the protocol fee.
Created in initialize_protocol as an ATA of protocol_config.
Validated here using associated_token constraints to match
how it was created.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — required by transfer_checked.

accounts.name: caller
docs: The caller — pays rent for the new PaymentRecord.
Can be any wallet. No permissions required.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig — checked for is_paused.

accounts.name: circle_account
docs: CircleAccount — must be Active.
The cycle parameter must match current_cycle —
you can only initialise the record for the
cycle that is currently active, not future ones.

accounts.name: payment_record
docs: PaymentRecord for the specified cycle — created here.
Seeds: [b"payment", circle_account, &[cycle]]
Initialised with paid_flags = 0.
Anchor's init constraint prevents creating a record
for a cycle that already has one.

accounts.name: admin
docs: The deployer wallet.
Pays rent for ProtocolConfig and TreasuryVault.
Becomes the protocol admin stored in ProtocolConfig.
Must sign the transaction.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig PDA — global singleton.
Seeds: [b"config"]
Created here. Will exist for the lifetime of the protocol.
init ensures this can only ever be called once —
if the account already exists the instruction reverts.

accounts.name: treasury_vault
docs: TreasuryVault — USDC token account PDA.
Seeds: [b"treasury", protocol_config.key()]
Receives protocol fees from every disburse_pot call.
Owned by the protocol — no private key controls it.
Only withdraw_treasury (admin only) can move funds out.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint account.
Passed in so the TreasuryVault is initialised with
the correct mint. Validated to be a valid mint account.

accounts.name: associated_token_program
docs: Required for token account rent exemption calculation.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Must be the admin stored in ProtocolConfig.
Only this keypair can pause the protocol.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig — is_paused flipped to true here.

accounts.name: member
docs: The paying member. Must be an active member
of this circle who has not been kicked.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig — checked for is_paused.

accounts.name: circle_account
docs: CircleAccount — must be Active.
Deadline slot must not have passed.

accounts.name: member_account
docs: MemberAccount — validated as belonging to this member
in this circle. Member must not be kicked.

accounts.name: payment_record
docs: PaymentRecord for the current cycle.
Seeds: [b"payment", circle_account, current_cycle]
Bitmask updated here to mark this member as paid.

accounts.name: member_token_account
docs: Member's USDC token account.
Source of the contribution payment.
Validated against the circle's configured mint.

accounts.name: pot_vault
docs: PotVault — receives the contribution.
Seeds: [b"pot_vault", circle_account]

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — required by transfer_checked.

accounts.name: caller
docs: The caller — any wallet. No special permissions.
Does not pay rent — no new accounts are created here.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig — checked for is_paused.

accounts.name: circle_account
docs: CircleAccount — must be Active.
active_members decremented if member is kicked.

accounts.name: defaulter_member_account
docs: Defaulting member's MemberAccount.
Seeds: [b"member", circle_account, defaulter]
Must not already be kicked.

accounts.name: defaulter_collateral_record
docs: Defaulting member's CollateralRecord.
total_slashed incremented here.

accounts.name: payment_record
docs: PaymentRecord for the current cycle.
Defaulter's bit is set here so disburse_pot
sees the cycle as fully covered and can proceed.

accounts.name: collateral_vault
docs: CollateralVault — source of the seized collateral.
Seeds: [b"collateral_vault", circle_account]
Authority: circle_account PDA.

accounts.name: pot_vault
docs: PotVault — receives the seized collateral amount.
Seeds: [b"pot_vault", circle_account]
Authority: circle_account PDA.

accounts.name: defaulter
docs: The defaulting member's wallet.
Used only for PDA seed validation.
No funds go to or from this account in this instruction.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — required by transfer_checked.

accounts.name: caller
docs: The caller — pays rent for the cycle 1 PaymentRecord.
Can be any wallet. No special permissions required.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig — checked for is_paused.

accounts.name: circle_account
docs: CircleAccount — must be in Ready state.
Transitions to Active in this instruction.
current_cycle set to 1.
cycle_deadline_slot set to now + cycle_duration_slots.

accounts.name: payment_record
docs: PaymentRecord PDA for cycle 1 — created here.
Seeds: [b"payment", circle_account, &[1u8]]
Tracks who has paid in cycle 1 via a u64 bitmask.
Cycle 1 is special — all contributions were already
paid at join time via join_circle. So we initialise
paid_flags with ALL bits set for active members,
meaning cycle 1 is immediately ready for disburse_pot.
This avoids requiring members to call pay_contribution
for a cycle they have already funded.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Must be the admin stored in ProtocolConfig.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig — is_paused flipped to false here.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Must be the admin stored in ProtocolConfig.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig — protocol_fee_bps updated here.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Must be the admin stored in ProtocolConfig.

accounts.name: protocol_config
docs: ProtocolConfig — provides admin validation and
serves as TreasuryVault authority.
Seeds: [b"config"]

accounts.name: treasury_vault
docs: TreasuryVault — source of the withdrawal.
Seeds: [b"treasury", protocol_config]
Authority: protocol_config PDA.

accounts.name: destination
docs: Destination token account — receives the withdrawn fees.
Must hold the same mint as TreasuryVault.
Admin chooses this address — can be any valid USDC ATA.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint — required by transfer_checked.

errors.name: ProtocolPaused
errors.msg: The protocol is currently paused. Please try again later.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Only the protocol admin can call this instruction.

errors.name: FeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Protocol fee cannot exceed 10%.

errors.name: CircleAlreadyOpen
errors.msg: A circle with these exact settings is already open and accepting members. Please join that circle instead.

errors.name: InvalidMemberCount
errors.msg: Member count must be between 2 and 20.

errors.name: ContributionTooLow
errors.msg: Contribution amount must be at least 1 USDC.

errors.name: InvalidFrequency
errors.msg: Invalid payout frequency selected.

errors.name: CircleNotOpen
errors.msg: This circle is no longer accepting members.

errors.name: CircleNotReady
errors.msg: This circle is not ready to start yet. All seats must be filled first.

errors.name: CircleNotActive
errors.msg: This circle is not currently active.

errors.name: CircleNotComplete
errors.msg: This circle has not completed yet. All cycles must be disbursed first.

errors.name: CircleAlreadyCancelled
errors.msg: This circle has already been cancelled.

errors.name: CancelWindowNotPassed
errors.msg: The 24-hour cancel window has not passed yet. The circle can only be cancelled if it has not filled within 24 hours of creation.

errors.name: CircleFull
errors.msg: This circle is full. No more members can join.

errors.name: Cycle1AlreadyFunded
errors.msg: Cycle 1 contributions were collected at join time and cannot be paid again.

errors.name: AlreadyMember
errors.msg: You have already joined this circle.

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient USDC balance to join this circle. Please check your wallet and try again.

errors.name: Position1WalletMissing
errors.msg: Position 1 wallet account is required for premium routing but was not provided.

errors.name: AlreadyPaid
errors.msg: You have already paid your contribution for this cycle.

errors.name: DeadlinePassed
errors.msg: The payment deadline for this cycle has passed. Your contribution cannot be accepted.

errors.name: DeadlineNotPassed
errors.msg: The deadline for this cycle has not passed yet. Default processing is not available.

errors.name: MemberAlreadyPaid
errors.msg: This member has already paid their contribution for this cycle.

errors.name: MemberKicked
errors.msg: You have been removed from this circle due to collateral exhaustion and cannot make further payments.

errors.name: NotAMember
errors.msg: You are not an active member of this circle.

errors.name: InvalidPaymentRecord
errors.msg: You have not joined this circle and cannot make contributions.

errors.name: NotAllMembersPaid
errors.msg: Not all active members have paid their contribution for this cycle yet.

errors.name: WrongRecipient
errors.msg: This member is not the designated recipient for the current cycle.

errors.name: AlreadyDisbursed
errors.msg: The pot for this cycle has already been disbursed.

errors.name: MemberNotDefaulted
errors.msg: This member has not missed a payment. Default processing cannot be triggered.

errors.name: MemberAlreadyKicked
errors.msg: This member has already been removed from the circle.

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: You have already claimed your collateral for this circle.

errors.name: NothingToClaim
errors.msg: There is no collateral to claim. Your locked amount was fully used to cover missed payments.

errors.name: UnauthorizedClaim
errors.msg: Unauthorized collateral claim. You can only claim your own collateral.

errors.name: UnauthorizedMember
errors.msg: Unauthorized. This instruction can only be called by the member who owns this account.

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: A calculation error occurred. This is likely a bug — please report it.

errors.name: MathUnderflow
errors.msg: A calculation error occurred. This is likely a bug — please report it.

errors.name: InvalidCycle
errors.msg: The specified cycle does not match the circle's current active cycle.

errors.name: InvariantViolation
errors.msg: Collateral invariant violated. Locked collateral cannot be less than remaining obligations. This is a critical protocol error.

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Invalid USDC mint. This circle only accepts the configured USDC token.

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: Invalid token account. The provided account does not match the expected owner or mint.

errors.name: ProtocolNotPaused
errors.msg: Protocol is not currently paused.

errors.name: InvalidWithdrawAmount
errors.msg: Withdrawal amount must be greater than zero.

errors.name: InsufficientTreasuryBalance
errors.msg: Withdrawal amount exceeds treasury vault balance.

types.name: CircleAccount
docs: CircleAccount — per-circle state PDA.
Seeds: [b"circle", contribution_amount.to_le_bytes(),
&[total_members], &[frequency as u8],
usdc_mint.as_ref()]
The seed fingerprint is the duplicate prevention mechanism.
Two circles with identical parameters resolve to the same
PDA address. If that address is already in Open state,
create_circle returns a descriptive error.

fields.name: contribution_amount
docs: Fixed contribution amount per cycle in USDC lamports.
6 decimal places: 100 USDC = 100_000_000
Set at creation. Never changes.

fields.name: total_members
docs: Total number of seats in this circle.
Set at creation. Never changes. Range: 2–20.

fields.name: active_members
docs: Number of members currently active (not kicked).
Starts equal to total_members once circle fills.
Decrements when a member is kicked via process_default.
This is what disburse_pot uses for pot calculation
and all-paid verification — not total_members.

fields.name: current_members
docs: Number of members who have joined so far.
Used to assign positions (position = current_members + 1).
Increments on every join_circle call.

fields.name: frequency
docs: Selected payout frequency.
Human-readable label chosen by creator.

fields.name: cycle_duration_slots
docs: Cycle duration in slots derived from frequency.
Biweekly:  3_024_000
Monthly:   6_480_000
Stored here so every instruction can read it directly
without recomputing from frequency enum.

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint address for this circle.
All collateral and contributions must use this mint.
Validated on every join and pay instruction.

fields.name: state
docs: Current circle state.
Enforced as a constraint on every instruction.

fields.name: current_cycle
docs: Current active cycle number. 1-indexed.
0 before the circle starts.
Increments in disburse_pot after each disbursement.
When current_cycle > active_members → Completed.

fields.name: cycle_deadline_slot
docs: Slot deadline for the current cycle's contributions.
Members must pay before this slot.
Set in start_circle for cycle 1.
Reset in disburse_pot for each subsequent cycle.
If current slot > this value, process_default is valid.

fields.name: cancel_deadline_slot
docs: Slot after which cancel_circle can be called.
Set in create_circle as:
Clock::get().slot + CANCEL_DEADLINE_SLOTS (216_000)
Only relevant while state = Open.

fields.name: started_at_slot
docs: Slot at which the circle transitioned to Active.
Set in start_circle. Zero before the circle starts.
Used to derive the full circle timeline on the frontend.

fields.name: completed_at_slot
docs: Slot at which the final cycle was disbursed.
Set in disburse_pot when state transitions to Completed.
Zero until circle completes.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed. Stored to avoid recomputation.

types.name: CircleState
docs: CircleState — the five valid states a circle can be in.
Transitions are strictly enforced — no instruction can
move a circle to an invalid state or skip a state.

types.name: CollateralRecord
docs: CollateralRecord — permanent collateral audit trail PDA.
Seeds: [b"colrec", circle_pubkey.as_ref(), member_pubkey.as_ref()]
Created in join_circle alongside MemberAccount.
MemberAccount tracks live state (what is locked right now).
CollateralRecord tracks history (what happened over time).
WHY TWO ACCOUNTS?
MemberAccount.collateral_locked decrements on each default.
By circle completion it no longer reflects the original amount.
CollateralRecord preserves total_locked permanently so
claim_collateral can always compute the correct return:
claimable = total_locked - total_slashed
This is also the account queried for transparency —
members and auditors can verify the full collateral history
for any participant in any circle at any time.

fields.name: circle
docs: The circle this record belongs to.

fields.name: member
docs: The member this record belongs to.

fields.name: total_locked
docs: Total collateral locked at join time.
Set once in join_circle. Never changes after that.
Formula: (total_members - position) × contribution_amount
For position N (last): 0
For position 1 (first): (N-1) × contribution_amount

fields.name: total_released
docs: Total collateral released back to the member.
Set in claim_collateral to the claimable amount.
0 until claim_collateral is called.
Should equal total_locked - total_slashed after claim.

fields.name: total_slashed
docs: Total collateral seized through default deductions.
Increments by exactly contribution_amount per default.
Always a clean multiple of contribution_amount.
If member never defaulted: 0.
If member was kicked: equals total_locked.

fields.name: claimed
docs: True after claim_collateral has been successfully called.
Prevents double-claiming.
Also used to verify circuit is complete in analytics.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: MemberAccount
docs: MemberAccount — per-member per-circle state PDA.
Seeds: [b"member", circle_pubkey.as_ref(), member_pubkey.as_ref()]
Created in join_circle. Lives for the circle lifetime.
Tracks the live state of this member's participation.
One per member per circle — impossible to fake or collide
because both circle and member pubkeys are in the seeds.
IMPORTANT: This is live state only.
The full collateral history (total_locked, total_slashed,
total_released) lives in CollateralRecord — the audit trail.

fields.name: circle
docs: The circle this member belongs to.
Used for cross-account validation.

fields.name: member
docs: The member's wallet public key.
Used for permission checks and premium routing.

fields.name: position
docs: Position in the payout order. 1-indexed.
Assigned at join time from current_members + 1.
Position 1 = receives pot in cycle 1.
Position N = receives pot in final cycle.
May be updated if a prior member is kicked —
positions shift down to fill the gap.

fields.name: collateral_locked
docs: Current locked collateral in USDC lamports.
Set at join time as (total_members - position) × contribution_amount.
Decrements by exactly contribution_amount per default deduction.
Always a clean multiple of contribution_amount.
Reaches 0 only through default deductions — never from
normal operation (collateral is returned via claim_collateral
at completion, not decremented during the circle).

fields.name: has_received_pot
docs: True once this member has received their pot disbursement.
Set in disburse_pot when current_cycle matches their position.
Used in the final completion check — all members must have
either received their pot or been kicked before COMPLETED.

fields.name: is_defaulted
docs: True if this member has missed at least one payment.
Set in process_default.
Does NOT mean they are kicked — just that they have defaulted
at least once. They can still pay future cycles if collateral
covers the missed one(s).

fields.name: is_kicked
docs: True if this member has been permanently removed from the circle.
Set in process_default when:
collateral_locked == 0 AND rounds still remain.
Once kicked, member cannot pay, cannot receive pot,
and cannot claim collateral (nothing left to claim).
active_members decrements in CircleAccount when this is set.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed. Stored to avoid recomputation.

types.name: PaymentRecord
docs: PaymentRecord — per-cycle payment tracking PDA.
Seeds: [b"payment", circle_pubkey.as_ref(), &[cycle_number]]
One account per cycle per circle.
Created in start_circle for cycle 1.
Created in disburse_pot for each subsequent cycle.
WHY A BITMASK?
A u64 bitmask is the most efficient way to track N members'
payment status in a single account read.
Bit 0 = position 1 paid
Bit 1 = position 2 paid
Bit N-1 = position N paid
To check if position P has paid:
let bit = 1u64 << (P - 1);
paid_flags & bit != 0
To check if ALL active members have paid:
let expected = (1u64 << active_members) - 1;
paid_flags & expected == expected
Supports up to 64 members (u64 has 64 bits).
Our max is 20 members so this is more than sufficient.
Bits for kicked members are pre-set by process_default
so disburse_pot never blocks waiting for a kicked member.
LIFECYCLE:
Created fresh each cycle with paid_flags = 0.
Fills up as members pay or are processed as defaulters.
Once disburse_pot fires, this record is historical.
It is never deleted — it becomes the permanent payment
history for that cycle, queryable by anyone.

fields.name: circle
docs: The circle this record belongs to.

fields.name: cycle
docs: The cycle number this record tracks. 1-indexed.

fields.name: paid_flags
docs: Bitmask tracking payment status for this cycle.
Bit N = 1 means position N+1 has been covered.
Covered means: paid via pay_contribution OR
covered by collateral seizure in process_default.
Starts at 0. Fills toward the expected_mask value.
When paid_flags & expected_mask == expected_mask:
disburse_pot can fire.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: PayoutFrequency
docs: PayoutFrequency — the four cycle duration options.
Mapped to Solana slot counts internally.
Users select a human-readable label.
The program stores both the enum and the derived slot count.

types.name: ProtocolConfig
docs: ProtocolConfig — global singleton PDA
Seeds: [b"config"]
Created once at initialize_protocol.
Read by every single instruction via is_paused check.
Written only by admin instructions.

fields.name: admin
docs: The admin public key.
Only this keypair can call admin-gated instructions:
pause_protocol, unpause_protocol, update_config,
withdraw_treasury.

fields.name: protocol_fee_bps
docs: Protocol fee in basis points.
Applied to every pot disbursement.
Deducted from pot before recipient receives net amount.

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Emergency pause flag.
When true, every instruction checks this first and
reverts immediately. Funds stay locked in vaults.
Only admin can flip this.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.
Stored so we never need to recompute it.
